title: cirsium × reyi
intro: Cirsium × reyi, also known as the Rey's thistle or Cirsium reyri, is a hybrid species of thistle in the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Cirsium × reyi include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing swelling and pain. The herbal preparations of Cirsium × reyi include infusions, decoctions, and infusions in the form of teas or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
